name: Whiskas Kitten Pouches Poultry M/Pak 12x85g
shortDescription: WHISKAS Kitten Poultry Feasts in Jelly – 100% complete nutrition for kittens aged 2–12 months. Supports strong bones, immunity, and healthy growth.
description: Give your kitten a deliciously nutritious start to life with WHISKAS Kitten Poultry Feasts , a complete wet cat food specially designed to support healthy growth, development, and vitality from 2 to 12 months of age. Each pouch is carefully crafted with 100% high-quality ingredients to deliver balanced nutrition and irresistible taste in every bite. Formulated with essential vitamins, minerals, taurine, and calcium , this meal helps strengthen natural defences, build strong bones and teeth, and support overall wellbeing. The tender, smaller chunks are ideal for little mouths and easy digestion, ensuring your kitten enjoys every mealtime while receiving the nourishment they need to thrive. Key Benefits Complete & Balanced Nutrition – Formulated to meet 100% of your kitten’s daily nutritional needs for healthy growth and development. Strong Bones & Teeth – Enriched with calcium and essential minerals to promote strong skeletal and dental health. Supports Natural Defences – Contains taurine and vitamins C, D₃, and E to boost immunity and overall vitality. Gentle on Tummies – Soft, bite-sized chunks with high-quality protein make digestion easy for small kittens. Sustainable Commitment – Produced in facilities where 85% already use renewable electricity, with a goal of reaching 100% by 2025. Ingredients With Chicken: Meat and animal derivatives (37%, including 4% chicken in the chunk), cereals, oils and fats, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Duck: Meat and animal derivatives (37%, including 4% duck in the chunk), cereals, oils and fats, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Poultry: Meat and animal derivatives (37%, including 4% poultry in the chunk), cereals, oils and fats, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Turkey: Meat and animal derivatives (37%, including 4% turkey in the chunk), cereals, oils and fats, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. *Chunk typically 43% of product. Guaranteed Analysis Nutrient Value (%) Protein 8.0 Fat Content 5.0 Crude Fibre 0.20 Inorganic Matter 1.6 Moisture 84.0 Calcium 0.32 Additives (per kg): Vitamins: Vitamin C – 667 mg, Vitamin D₃ – 200 IU, Vitamin E – 138 mg Amino Acids: Taurine – 1100 mg Trace Elements: Copper (CuSO₄·5H₂O) – 1.2 mg, Iodine (Ca(IO₃)₂) – 0.32 mg, Iron (FeSO₄·H₂O) – 16.1 mg, Manganese (MnSO₄·H₂O) – 3.2 mg, Zinc (ZnSO₄·H₂O) – 16.2 mg Technological Additives: Cassia gum – 2041 mg Sensory Additives: Natural flavourings Why Choose WHISKAS Kitten Poultry Feasts Expertly formulated for kittens aged 2–12 months Made with 100% high-quality ingredients for balanced nutrition Supports immunity, growth, and digestive health Enriched with taurine, calcium, and essential vitamins Environmentally conscious production using renewable energy sources Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place , away from direct sunlight and moisture. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and consume within 2 days. Ensure pouches are stored upright and sealed to maintain freshness. Feeding & Usage Feed according to your kitten’s age, weight, and activity level . Provide fresh drinking water at all times. Serve at room temperature for maximum flavour and palatability. Diet Transition To switch your kitten to WHISKAS Kitten Poultry Feasts, introduce the new food gradually over 7–8 days : Days 1–2: 25% new food, 75% old food Days 3–4: 50% new food, 50% old food Days 5–6: 75% new food, 25% old food Days 7–8: 100% new food Maintain regular feeding times and environments during this transition. If your kitten shows signs of digestive upset, slow down the transition process. Consult your veterinarian if needed Give your kitten the perfect start in life with WHISKAS Kitten Poultry Feasts in Jelly — a delicious, nutrient-rich meal that supports healthy growth, strong immunity, and endless playtime energy.
